summary: Tested all 3 features: (1) Free user VIP page redirect, (2) Referral bonus for inactive sessions, (3) Credit card design. All backend tests passed (10/10). Fixed MarketplaceEnhanced.js redirect from /vip-membership to /dashboard.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - MarketplaceEnhanced.js was redirecting to /vip-membership (non-existent route) instead of /dashboard

GiftVoucherRedemption.js: Line 27-30 correctly redirects free users to /dashboard
Marketplace.js: Line 43-49 correctly redirects free users to /dashboard
MarketplaceEnhanced.js: Line 55 FIXED - changed from /vip-membership to /dashboard
MarketplaceEnhanced.js: Line 246 FIXED - changed from /vip to /dashboard
server.py count_active_referrals_by_level: Lines 731-788 correctly checks mining_active=True AND mining_session_end > current_time
DashboardModern.js: Credit card design verified - PARAS REWARD logo (Line 401-409), ACTIVE indicator (Line 413-419), artistic SVG illustrations (Line 274-366)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 3 VIP pages redirect correctly, credit card design verified)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test users from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified working: (1) Free users accessing /bill-payments, /gift-vouchers, /marketplace are redirected to /dashboard with VIP required toast message. (2) Referral bonus logic in count_active_referrals_by_level now checks mining_active=True AND mining_session_end > current_time (not just last_login). (3) Credit card on dashboard has PARAS REWARD logo, ACTIVE indicator, artistic SVG illustrations (coins, trophy, gift, stars, wallet), BALANCE text, CARD HOLDER text, and gradient styling.

referral_bonus_inactive_session.logic_verified: count_active_referrals_by_level checks mining_active=True AND mining_session_end > current_time
referral_bonus_inactive_session.test_scenario: Created parent/child users, verified child without active mining session does NOT count as active referral
